growth_records.cite: Iffland-Stettner et al. A Genome-Scale Metabolic Model of Marine Heterotroph Vibrio splendidus Strain 1A01. mSystems (2023). DOI:10.1128/msystems.00377-22. [PMC10134806]
growth_records.snippet: The growth rates obtained were 1.38 ± 0.05 h−1 (marine broth), 0.79 ± 0.01 h−1 (glucose), 0.40 ± 0.01 h−1 (glycerol), and 0.28 ± 0.01 h−1 (galactose)
growth_records.notes: mu=1.38 h-1 reported (SD 0.05, 3 replicates) from linear regression of OD600 during exponential growth in Difco marine broth 2216 (37.4 g/L). doubling_time = ln2/mu = 0.6931/1.38 = 0.502 h (calculated). No substrate uptake/secretion fluxes reported for complex marine broth. Cultures grown at 27C, 250 rpm.

growth_records.medium: Complete minimal seawater medium (1x SW) with D-glucose

up.method: consumption yield measured as slope of glucose depletion vs OD600 (Fig 4a); numeric flux value only in figure

sec.method: excretion yield measured as slope of acetate accumulation vs OD600 (Fig 4a); acetate secreted on glucose; numeric flux only in figure

yields.note: consumption and excretion yields reported as slopes in Fig 4 (units carbon-monomer per OD600); numeric values not in text. GAM=15.8 mmol/gCDW; NGAM=12.8 mmol/gCDW/h (model maintenance params); baseline carbon utilization y-intercept 23.3 mM-C/OD600

growth_records.cite: Iffland-Stettner et al. A Genome-Scale Metabolic Model of Marine Heterotroph Vibrio splendidus Strain 1A01. mSystems (2023). DOI:10.1128/msystems.00377-22. [PMC10134806]
growth_records.snippet: growth rates were deduced (0.79 h−1 for glucose and 0.29 h−1 for galactose)... consumption yields... together with the excretion yield of acetate, as the slopes of the respective plots
growth_records.notes: mu=0.79 h-1 reported (SD 0.01) for growth on glucose in 1x SW minimal medium; single GAM batch used 5 mM glucose, osmolyte/composition measurements used 10 mM glucose (listed here). doubling_time=ln2/0.79=0.6931/0.79=0.877 h (calculated). Glucose uptake (blue slope) and acetate secretion (red slope) measured vs OD600 in Fig 4a but absolute mmol/gCDW/h fluxes are only shown graphically, not in text — rate left null to avoid fabrication. GAM=15.8 mmol/gCDW and NGAM=12.8 mmol/gCDW/h derived by FBA fitting; carbon utilization rate baseline 23.3 mM-C/OD600. Temp 27C, 250 rpm, pH 8 (HEPES).

growth_records.medium: Complete minimal seawater medium (1x SW) with glycerol
growth_records.cite: Iffland-Stettner et al. A Genome-Scale Metabolic Model of Marine Heterotroph Vibrio splendidus Strain 1A01. mSystems (2023). DOI:10.1128/msystems.00377-22. [PMC10134806]
growth_records.snippet: The growth rates obtained were ... 0.40 ± 0.01 h−1 (glycerol) ...
growth_records.notes: mu=0.40 h-1 reported (SD 0.01) for growth on glycerol in 1x SW minimal medium. doubling_time=ln2/0.40=0.6931/0.40=1.733 h (calculated). Glycerol osmolyte quantified at 20 mM (concentration listed). No uptake/secretion fluxes reported for this substrate. Temp 27C, 250 rpm, pH 8.

growth_records.medium: Complete minimal seawater medium (1x SW) with D-galactose

up.method: consumption yield measured as slope of galactose depletion vs OD600 (Fig 4b); numeric flux only in figure

sec.method: reported: acetate is NOT secreted when grown on galactose (Fig 4 caption)

yields.note: consumption yield reported as slope in Fig 4b (units carbon-monomer per OD600); numeric value not in text

growth_records.cite: Iffland-Stettner et al. A Genome-Scale Metabolic Model of Marine Heterotroph Vibrio splendidus Strain 1A01. mSystems (2023). DOI:10.1128/msystems.00377-22. [PMC10134806]
growth_records.snippet: 0.28 ± 0.01 h−1 (galactose)... Acetate is not secreted when V. splendidus 1A01 is grown on galactose... growth rate of 0.29 h−1
growth_records.notes: mu=0.28 h-1 reported (SD 0.01) in Fig 2 legend; text elsewhere states 0.29 h-1 for the galactose GAM batch culture. doubling_time=ln2/0.28=0.6931/0.28=2.476 h (calculated). Galactose uptake measured (Fig 4b slope) but absolute mmol/gCDW/h not in text -> rate null. Acetate secretion = 0 (explicitly not secreted on galactose per Fig 4 caption). Osmolyte quantified at 10 mM galactose; GAM batch used 5 mM. Temp 27C, 250 rpm, pH 8.

phenotypes.base_medium: Sole-substrate growth / assimilation on a defined minimal medium (substrate as C/N/energy source) — positive = the organism grows on it
phenotypes.citation: BacDive strain 17329 (Reimer LC et al., BacDive 2022, NAR); https://bacdive.dsmz.de/strain/17329

phenotypes.base_medium: Enzyme / activity assay (hydrolysis, degradation, reduction, electron transfer) in a test medium — not a sole-substrate growth test
